channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: ‘We are comfortable financially’: My husband is in his 60s and has $500,000 life insurance. Is this a good time to cancel?
item.description: <![CDATA[‘We are comfortable financially’: My husband is in his 60s and has $500,000 life insurance. Is this a good time to cancel?]]>

item.title: Social Security benefits and costs are perfectly reasonable — no case exists for massive cuts
item.description: <![CDATA[Social Security benefits and costs are perfectly reasonable — no case exists for massive cuts]]>

item.title: My wife and I are 61. We have $2.2 million and expect $5,000 in Social Security benefits. Do we claim early?
